chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-644 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.12.2021 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Chang advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with inspector Ali Asghar Chang PS Faiz Ganj District Khairpur. Mst. Haseena present in person. -.-.-. This petition has been filed for quashing of FIR bearing crime No.19/2021 u/s 365-B PPC at PS Kot Laloo District Khairpur registered against petitioner No.2 and others for abducting Mst. Haseena. On the very first date viz. 15.04.2021 since petitioner No.1 Mst. Ambreen Khatoon had claimed to be abductee and refuted allegations of her abduction, interim order directing the investigating officer not to arrest the accused was passed. However, during the hearing of this case complainant produced a lady who claimed to be abductee Mst. Haseena and supported the contents of FIR. In view of such predicament the matter was referred to SSP Kharipur Mir’s for investigation and report. Today, the report has been submitted by the investigation officer / enquiry officer DSP/SDPO Mirwah disclosing that petitioner No.1 is the actual wife of petitioner No.2 an accused in aforesaid FIR and she is not the abductee Haseena. That only in order to misguide the court has shown herself as Mst. Ambreen alias Haseena so that relief could be sought. Along with such report relevant documents in support thereof have also been filed. We have heard learned counsel for the petitioners. He has not been able to either rebut the report of the aforesaid police official nor has been able to satisfy about identity of petitioner No.1 to be the abductee Mst.

We have heard learned counsel for the petitioners. He has not been able to either rebut the report of the aforesaid police official nor has been able to satisfy about identity of petitioner No.1 to be the abductee Mst. Haseena for whose abduction case has been registered against petitioner No.2 and others. We, therefore, find the petition meritless and dismiss it accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
